login.title: Admin sign-in
login.subtitle: Supabase auth · password + TOTP
login.configHint2: Add ADMIN_ALLOWED_EMAILS with your admin email.
login.configHint3: Enable TOTP MFA for this account in Supabase Auth.

mfa.stepHint: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.

enroll.step1Hint: Open Google Authenticator, Authy, or a compatible app, then scan this code.
enroll.step2Hint: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app.
enroll.codeInvalid: Enter the 6-digit code from the app.

password.title: Change password
password.policy: Re-authentication required · 12+ characters · upper, lower, number, symbol · sessions invalidated on success

logout.title: Confirm sign-out
logout.desc: You will leave the admin area. A new sign-in (password + MFA) will be required.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.reviewsBody: New reviews arrive by email (API {api}). To publish a review on the site, add it in {file} then redeploy.
dashboard.contactBody: Contact forms are sent to {email} via Resend. Check your inbox or the Resend dashboard for incoming messages.
dashboard.contactNext: Next step: store submissions in Supabase to review them here.
dashboard.demoBody: Projects and reviews on the site are samples. Replace them with real work and client feedback before production.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.mfa_required: MFA authentication required for this action.
errors.mfa_invalid: Invalid or expired code. Try again.
errors.mfa_enroll_failed: Unable to generate the TOTP QR. Try again.
errors.mfa_already_enrolled: A TOTP factor is already active. Use the verification step.
errors.password_reauth_failed: Unable to change password. Check your current password.
errors.password_update_failed: Unable to save the new password. Try again shortly.
errors.password_weak: This password is too weak or compromised. Choose another.
errors.password_same: The new password must be different from the current one.
errors.account_locked: Account temporarily locked after too many failures. Try again later.
errors.cooldown: Please wait a few seconds before sending again.
